creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Work fine for me on 13.2-p9 amd64 with build options:
        ALSA           : off
        CANBERRA       : off
        DBUS           : off
        DEBUG          : off
        FFMPEG         : on
        JACK           : off
        LIBPROXY       : on
        LTO            : off
        OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS: on
        PROFILE        : off
        PULSEAUDIO     : off
        SNDIO          : off
        TEST           : off

Port was updated today to 123.0 rc2 - check it too.
